title: Evaluation of non-destructive DNA extraction protocols for insect metabarcoding: gentler and shorter is better
author: Marquina, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw data from metabarcoding of mock communities sequencing on Illumina MiSeq (COI + 16S markers), from the article "Evaluation of non-destructive DNA extraction protocols for insect metabarcoding: gentler and shorter is better", Metabarcoding & Metagenomics 2022.
steps_raw: Raw data from metabarcoding of mock communities sequencing on Illumina MiSeq (COI + 16S markers), from the article "Evaluation of non-destructive DNA extraction protocols for insect metabarcoding: gentler and shorter is better", Metabarcoding & Metagenomics 2022.
